steps.title: Use the spent pattern
steps.content: The sentence uses the pattern spent plus a length of time plus an action. That structure needs the -ing form of the action after the time phrase.

steps.title: Check the verb forms
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C are finite verb phrases, and Choice D is a past-tense or participle form. Choice A, collecting, is the gerund that fits after spent 161 days. The answer is A.
